# Jetharam Moond — Sr. Magento & WordPress Frontend Developer

> Jetharam Moond is a Sr. Magento / WordPress Frontend & UI Developer based in Gurugram, India, with 10+ years of frontend development experience and 8+ years specializing in Magento 2 & Hyvä theme architecture, WordPress/CMS development, and Core Web Vitals performance optimization. He is an immediate joiner, open to relocation.

## Identity

- **Full Name:** Jetharam Moond (Jetha Ram Moond)
- **Role:** Sr. Magento / WordPress Frontend & UI Developer

## Core Skills

### Magento Frontend Development
- Magento 2 Theme Development & Customization (Expert — 8+ years)
- Hyvä Theme Development (Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS)
- Knockout.js & RequireJS Customization
- XML Layout & PHTML Template Development
- Less CSS / Magento UI Components

### Core Web Technologies
- HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)
- Alpine.js, jQuery
- Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- Responsive & Mobile-First Design
- Cross-Browser Compatibility Testing

### CMS Platforms
- WordPress Theme & Plugin Customization
- Gutenberg Block Development
- Joomla Development
- Shopify Storefront Customization

### Performance & Optimization
- Core Web Vitals Optimization (LCP, CLS, INP)
- PageSpeed Insights, GTmetrix, Pingdom Auditing & Tuning
- Image, Asset & Critical CSS Optimization
- Lazy Loading & JS/CSS Bundling Strategies

### DevOps & Tools
- Git Version Control
- Jira Project Tracking
- Docker, Nginx
- WSL / Ubuntu Development Environment

### Design & Soft Skills
- Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop (UI Handoff & Prototyping)
- WCAG Accessibility Best Practices
- Team Leadership & Mentoring
- Client Communication & Requirement Analysis

## Experience Summary

- **10+ years** of professional experience in Frontend Development, with **8+ years** focused on Magento 2 / Hyvä eCommerce frontend architecture
- Currently **Sr. Frontend Developer** at **OrangeSky Pvt. Ltd.**, Gurugram (Present)
- Previously held frontend/Magento developer roles delivering live eCommerce storefronts and WordPress/CMS sites for clients across retail, furniture, and fashion industries
- Proven track record of leading frontend teams, mentoring junior developers, and improving site performance to 90+ PageSpeed scores

## Key Projects & Achievements

### Panasonic India Store
Developed and maintained the Magento 2 frontend for Panasonic's official India eCommerce storefront, focusing on responsive UI, custom modules, and performance.

### Partap Fashions
Built a custom Magento 2 / Hyvä theme storefront for a fashion & apparel retail brand, including product listing, cart, and checkout UI customizations.

### EZ Living Interiors
Delivered the frontend for an interiors & furniture eCommerce store, with custom Magento theme components, responsive product galleries, and optimized page load performance.

### Diya Online
Developed and customized the Magento 2 storefront for Diya Online, including theme styling, layout customization, and cross-browser/device testing.

### 15+ Additional Live Projects
Contributed to 15+ additional live Magento, WordPress, Joomla, and Shopify projects across various industries, covering theme development, customization, performance tuning, and ongoing maintenance.

## Education

- M.A. (Arts), Maharaja Ganga Singh University, Bikaner (2015)
- BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications), Maharaja Ganga Singh University, Bikaner (2013)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who is Jetharam Moond?**
Jetharam Moond is a Sr. Magento / WordPress Frontend & UI Developer based in Gurugram, India, with 10+ years of frontend development experience, including 8+ years specializing in Magento 2 and Hyvä theme architecture.

**What does Jetharam Moond specialize in?**
He specializes in Magento 2 & Hyvä theme development (Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS, Knockout.js), WordPress & CMS development (Gutenberg, Joomla, Shopify), and Core Web Vitals / PageSpeed performance optimization for eCommerce storefronts.

**Does Jetharam Moond have Hyvä theme experience?**
Yes. He has hands-on experience building and customizing Hyvä themes using Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS for Magento 2 storefronts, including projects like Partap Fashions.

**Does Jetharam Moond have WordPress experience?**
Yes. He has built and customized WordPress sites using Gutenberg blocks, custom themes, and plugins, in addition to Joomla and Shopify development.
